root_text.an5.255:1.1: “Pañcannaṁ, bhikkhave, macchariyānaṁ pahānāya samucchedāya brahmacariyaṁ vussati.
root_text.an5.255:1.4: kulamacchariyassa … lābhamacchariyassa … vaṇṇamacchariyassa … dhammamacchariyassa pahānāya samucchedāya brahmacariyaṁ vussati.
root_text.an5.255:1.5: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ macchariyānaṁ pahānāya samucchedāya brahmacariyaṁ vussatī”ti.

translation_text.an5.255:1.1: “Mendicants, the spiritual life is lived to give up and cut out these five kinds of stinginess.
translation_text.an5.255:1.3: Stinginess with dwellings, families, material things, praise, and the teachings.
translation_text.an5.255:1.5: The spiritual life is lived to give up and cut out these five kinds of stinginess.”
